items.title: People, Transformation & Private Equity
items.source_url:
https://events.compiledmcr.com/

Join senior leaders from across Finance, Technology, AI & Data for a breakfast discussion on the role people play in successful transformation within PE backed businesses.

Featuring four expert speakers, the session will explore leadership, change, value creation and the Insights Discovery framework, providing practical perspectives on how people, communication and culture can accelerate business performance.

Tom Pearson - Head of Data & AI at BGF
Attiq Qureshi - CIO, ex CDIO for Manchester United
Rob O'Connor - Fractional Finance Director
Hannah Mills - SF Head of Talent & Insights Practitioner 🟡🟢🔴🔵

When: Wednesday 1st July 8am-10am
Where: Colony Fabrica, Manchester
RSVP: Email jmaude@sfpartners.com or rlivesey@sfpartners.com

items.title: Unlocking New Possibilities with the Oracle AI Ecosystem
items.source_url:
https://events.compiledmcr.com/

An executive innovation experience, connecting AI, data and applications to real business outcomes.

Unlocking New Possibilities with the Oracle AI Ecosystem

Join us at Oracle's offices in Moorgate, London for Kovaion Connect 2026 - a focused executive briefing showing how Oracle Applications, Data, AI, OCI and Oracle APEX come together to help organisations innovate faster, operate smarter and unlock measurable business outcomes.

This is a half-day session built for senior decision-makers, combining thought leadership, the latest Oracle AI product updates, live demonstrations and one-to-one advisory conversations. The morning briefing moves from strategy to live innovation, followed by a networking lunch and optional private advisory slots in the afternoon. One Oracle. More value. Limitless innovation.

What you can expect

  • Executive insights into how AI, data and enterprise applications are reshaping the way organisations operate

  • The newest embedded AI capabilities across Oracle Fusion Applications

  • Release highlights and AI enhancements in Oracle APEX that accelerate enterprise innovation

  • Live demos of intelligent enterprise applications built on Oracle APEX and Oracle AI

  • A practical view of building an AI-ready data foundation with unified analytics

  • Private 1:1 executive advisory discussions with Oracle and Kovaion experts (afternoon, by request)

  • A networking lunch to exchange perspectives with peers and specialists

The day at a glance

  • 09:30 – 13:30 - Main session and networking lunch

  • 13:30 – 17:00 - Optional 1:1 executive advisory sessions

Who should attend

This briefing is designed for CIOs and CTOs, Heads of Applications, IT and Operations, Data and AI leaders, and Transformation heads - the people setting the enterprise technology, AI and digital strategy agenda.

Featured speakers include

  • Simon Hunt - Head of Product Management, Oracle APEX, Oracle UK

  • Mohana Priya Venkatachalam - Chief Projects Officer, Kovaion UK

  • Srinivas Nadella - Strategic Accounts Manager, Kovaion UK

With more Oracle and industry speakers to be announced.

You can view full agenda here - https:/www.kovaion.com/kovaion-connect-2026/

Venue: Oracle Corporation UK Ltd., One South Place, London EC2M 2RB - minutes from Moorgate, Liverpool Street and Bank stations, with rail, Underground and Elizabeth line connections.
